steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content: Both given values are $f(0)=6$ and $f(8)=6$. Slope $= \dfrac{6-6}{8-0} = 0$, so $f$ is a constant function.

steps.title: Evaluate Each Choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — $ f(x) = 0 $: A constant function always returning 0 contradicts $f(0)=6$. ✗
  • Choice B — $ f(x) = 8 $: A constant function returning 8 contradicts $f(0)=6$. ✗
  • Choice C — $ f(x) = 6 $: A constant function returning 6 satisfies $f(0)=6$ and $f(8)=6$. ✓
  • Choice D — $ f(x) = x + 6 $: This has slope 1, not 0; also $f(8)=14 \neq 6$. ✗
C is correct.
